summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, label, comment, fix, or PR-raise mutations are planned. Security-sensitive hydrated refs are routed only for central security handling; non-security PRs are classified independently.
